release_candidate_required_gates.evidence: go test ./... covers proxy/WebRTC policy, managed extra arg collision, profile lock, dry-run command generation, and wrapper/browser package behavior.
python3 -m unittest tests.test_detector_harness covers target listing, matrix planning, validation, sanitization rejection, operational timeout, and KG JSONL edges.

python3 -m unittest tests.test_package_runtime covers platform plan, missing browser rejection, wrapper/browser zip packaging, checksums, non-placeholder SPDX-2.3-style SBOM metadata, file hashes/sizes, and source/patchset provenance hashes.

BrowseForge commit 76ec639 dispatches browseforge-chromium through the Chromium launcher; local dogfood evidence records GET/runtime config, profile create, session launch, RuntimeID reporting, profile isolation, and Playwright Bind connection.

source-acquisition.json records checked-out Chromium refs/tags/150.0.7871.101, Linux deps sync, Docker deps image, GN output at out/BrowseForgeLinuxDocker, and applied BrowseForge scaffold/webdriver/hardware/screen/platform/timezone/locale/user-agent/storage-quota/plugins/WebRTC/audio/canvas/WebGL/feature-parity/fonts/process-priority patches.

python3 scripts/package_linux_runtime.py --execute produced launchable dist/browseforge-runtime-chromium-v0.1.0-alpha.0-linux-x64.zip with sha256 ee95af2f7c4b3221554ad580746dd8b56f5a077b83a6fec37518bfd71bf07fb8 and size 567794441 bytes; docker linux/amd64 packaged smoke reached Chrome/150.0.7871.101 DevTools /json/version and SannySoft navigation completed using knowledge/manifests/linux-package-smoke.json.

Live SannySoft headless/direct Docker evidence is recorded at detectors/evidence/v0.1.0-alpha.0/linux-x64/sannysoft/detrun_linux_x64_sannysoft_headless_docker_direct_20260709.json. It verifies navigator.webdriver=false but fails locale/timezone, hardware, WebGL, and headless UA expectations; release-grade headed BrowserLeaks/Pixelscan/iphey/BrowserScan/CreepJS/SannySoft matrix remains required.

dist/stage/browseforge-runtime-chromium-v0.1.0-alpha.0-linux-x64 contains artifact-manifest.json, provenance.json, SBOM.json, runtime.manifest.json, wrapper binary, patched chrome, ICU/resources/locales/crashpad/GPU runtime sidecars; python3 -m json.tool validated JSON metadata, unzip -t validated the archive, and dist/checksums.txt records the artifact sha256.
